title: Any reference material like a full blown eva wiki
display_title: Any reference material like a full blown eva wiki
wikitext:
[]: Any reference material? like a full blown eva-wiki?             Quote Post by Varxtis » Mon May 31, 2010 9:53 pm Okay, So I've watched and loved Eva since the First original series DVD was released in United States. Yes, Im sure there are those of you who were fans since before that, and I just say "hai hai" and wave you off. Now to the point: Since first watching the series, there are so many questions, as many people seem to share as indicated on the forums, about the series and am just wondering if there is some sort of Giant, unified eva wiki or encyclopedia that gives the definition and breakdown of all religious terms, angel names with their religious tie-in, characters, timelines and occurences any where For instance, 2nd impact: I understand that humanss were excavating, found adam, meddled by poking it with Longinus' lance (I would have just used a branch) and then boom, 2nd impact. But I CANT be right about that. I want to know exactly what happened, how, why, where, blah blah blah. The Evas themselves: I was led to believe in the series that the evas were some how part of adam, or adam clones, with the souls of the childrens mothers in them. Id like more definitive clear information about that. Rei/Kwarou: their bodies are clones of shinjis mother and whatever (their old dog spike for all I know), but I want more info on that. Seele and Gendo/NERV: Both seem to be struggling over opposing goals, but in the end, both seem to be content with the same outcome, so a breakdown on each role, goal, and where they started would be awesome. Adam himself/itself (however refered in the eva universe): Im SO confused. . . Youve got adam himself that caused 2nd impact, got whipped away, all but the embryo SPOILER: Show

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Mon May 31, 2010 10:00 pm Have you browsed our wiki? http://wiki.evageeks.org/

[]:             Quote Post by Ornette » Mon May 31, 2010 10:03 pm There's a lot of details that are simply not provided, like the mechanics of 2nd Impact. There's a lot of fans that put together what they think happened, but that's nothing definitive or "official". I assume you've looked through the Wiki here at Evageeks along with the Theory and Analysis sections which contain some non-official work and the Resources which contain official published information.

[]:             Quote Post by Varxtis » Tue Jun 01, 2010 9:50 am Ya, I have I have reviewed the wiki on here, but was hoping there maybe something a little more in depth.

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Tue Jun 01, 2010 9:53 am Varxtis wrote: Ya, I have I have reviewed the wiki on here, but was hoping there maybe something a little more in depth.

[]:             Quote Post by Shogo-Kun » Tue Jun 01, 2010 11:26 am Yeah, I've been meaning to ask someone how I can contribute. I can't speak/understand Japanese and my interpretations of EVA may not be correct, but I still would like to be useful.

[]:             Quote Post by Twin Drive Sigma Aquarion » Tue Jun 01, 2010 11:34 am I have done some actual research on the extra canon evas and angels so maybe I could help on that too?

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Tue Jun 01, 2010 11:37 am Please see this thread for information about contributing to the wiki: http://forum.evageeks.org/viewtopic.php?t=4512
